title: Career Assistant
subtitle: Detects and enriches skills, experiences, projects and stories from your text
placeholder: Ask something or paste text about your career...
emptyState: Paste any text about your work — a review, an old bio, a project recap — and I'll suggest new entries or enrich existing ones (e.g. add an achievement to a job already on file), in the right section.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
incomplete: Some required details are missing — give the assistant more info (e.g. dates) or add it manually in its section.
